Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory760.jpg'}
{1: 'Fight Club', 2: 'Super Earth', 4: '13:30PM'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxZhandou/FxKnockoutPingmu.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'DialogEnable'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: 'Can you FEEL your brachioradialis burning?! That\'s the call of the wild fused with your DNA! Strike while the iron\'s HOT! ONE MORE SET, LIFT!!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Gluttonous Sloth', 3: 'C-coach, I can\'t lift anymore!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: 'You WEAKLING, have you forgotten the teachings bestowed upon us by our glorious President?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: 'Never GIVE UP! Never LET DOWN! Never CRY! Never SAY GOODBYE!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: 'LIFT!!!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'As you push open the doors of the fitness center, the constant clanging of various exercise machines fills the air.'}
{3: 'Tonight\'s livestream theme is dance, and the two of them have chosen the gym as their special training spot to improve Vie-chan\'s physical coordination through exercise.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Vie-chan walks beside you, her face filled with curiosity as she observes the diverse array of unfamiliar equipment around the room.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Ooh, so this is what they call a "gym"?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'You\'ve never been to a gym?', 3: '28'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'The Supreme Leader is very busy, you know. When it comes to exercise, flying around and defeating bad guys is enough for me.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'After looking around, she stops at the treadmill area, watching people dripping with sweat as they run. Her face twists into a puzzled expression.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'They clearly look exhausted, so why do they keep running so desperately?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Everyone has their reasons for working out.', 3: '35'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: 'Hurry! Want others to praise your gains? Want to be the one who knocks? Then hurry up and get moving!', 4: '18'}
{3: 'Your answer is interrupted by a sudden shout.'}
{3: 'The "statue-like man" who had been wandering around seems to notice Vie-chan and you, and strides quickly in your direction.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Idiot! Working out is for yourself. Why should anyone care about what others think?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: 'NEIN NEIN NEIN, the essence of sports is POWER. And the essence of POWER is the approval from all the CHICOS.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiChopping03.prefab', 2: '2', 5: '1'}
{2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: 'Oh wait! That familiar voice, could you be?!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiChopping03.prefab', 5: '1'}
{3: 'The imperious "statue-like man" meets Vie-chan\'s gaze, and his voice instantly becomes friendly.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'You\'re too loud. Shut up.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiActivityBranch/FxUiActivityBranchSmokePurple.prefab', 2: '2', 5: '2'}
{3: 'In the next instant, Vie-chan\'s eyes glimmer with a violet glow.'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiActivityBranch/FxUiActivityBranchSmokePurple.prefab', 5: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiZhuanchangBaiEnd.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryBlackSmokeNew.prefab', 2: '2', 3: '1'}
{1: 'PanelActor1Shake'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: '—', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She extends her tail, gently swaying it before the "statue-like man," who instantly freezes in place.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryBlackSmokeNew.prefab', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryBlackSmokeNew.prefab', 2: '2', 3: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Vie-chan and Raven were just passing by. You didn\'t see anything, kay?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Run along now, attaboy.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryBlackSmokeNew.prefab', 4: '2'}
{3: 'As if receiving an irresistible command, the "statue-like man" departs without a word, marching away with mechanical precision.'}
{2: 'What did you do?', 3: '86', 4: 'What happened to him?', 5: '86'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'For an idol, maintaining a mysterious image is super important, right? If people recognized me here, the line for autographs would stretch all the way to Alpha Centauri.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'So, I used a little trick to keep people from recognizing our true identities or coming over to bother us.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She steps onto the weight bench and turns around with arms spread wide, proving her words with a flamboyant flourish.'}
{3: 'The crowd around them continues with their routines, completely oblivious to this quirky, mischievous girl.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'In other words, this is now a... private... little... date, just for Raven and Vie-chan, isn\'t it?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I understand.', 3: '97', 4: '...Don\'t forget we\'re here for special training.', 5: '97'}
{3: 'Vie-chan looks like she wants to say something more, but her gaze suddenly shifts to something in the distance, her attention seemingly caught by something.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Hey, look at that room in the corner! So many people are going there.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Following her gaze, you see people gathered in pairs, as if waiting for the start of some important event.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Couples Fitness Competition—and the prize is... discount vouchers for Hyakurou Ichibancho shopping district?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She cranes her neck forward curiously, reading the text on the distant banner.'}
{3: 'At the word "competition", her eyes light up with excitement, her dormant competitive spirit flaring to life.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'I want to try this too! Raven, let\'s go—', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineSpreadNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'Before you can respond, she\'s already grabbed your arm and pulled you towards a room in the corner.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineSpreadNew.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryBlackPassScene.prefab', 2: '3', 7: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory637.jpg'}

{1: '1', 2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: 'The rules for this match are very simple. Once the competition begins, standard demonstration moves will play on the big screen. Each move must be completed together as a pair.', 4: '1'}

{2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: 'The terminal next to each team will detect whether your movements match the standard and score them in real-time. The team with the highest score after the 5 minutes are up will win these valuable shopping vouchers.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: 'If everybody is ready to go, please get into position—the match is about to begin!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'After guiding Vie-chan through a quick warm-up, you join her at your assigned position.'}
{3: 'More than a dozen couples are spread across the spacious indoor area, including people who\'ve teamed up for fun. Everyone is warming up eagerly, each with a look of fierce determination.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Raven, are you ready? Don\'t you dare slow me down, okay?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She raises a slender arm, striking a pose to show off her "muscles."'}
{2: 'You\'d better do your best too.', 3: '141', 4: 'We\'re definitely winning this one.', 5: '141'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiTRPGMaze/FxUiTRPGMaze01.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiTrial/FxUiTrialGet.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'As powerful music blares through the speakers, the large screen ahead of us finally begins the countdown.'}
{3: 'For the first exercise, partners face each other in a push-up position, alternately extending left and right hands to high-five in midair.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Whoa, that\'s it? I thought it would be way harder!', 4: '18'}
{3: 'For the second exercise, the screen instructs partners to sit back-to-back with legs extended, alternately passing the scoring terminal between them.'}

{3: 'These exercises are child\'s play for someone with military training like yourself. Beside you, Vie-chan follows your rhythm without missing a beat, executing each coordinated movement precisely to rack up the points.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiTrial/FxUiTrialGet.prefab'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '0.8', 5: '0.4'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Inside the White Box, Jetavie\'s body seems different from reality, appearing organic in nature, yet she still displays physical abilities far beyond an ordinary person\'s.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0.8', 4: '0', 5: '0.4'}
{3: '—Lost in these thoughts, you suddenly feel something touch your right shoulder.'}
{3: 'You instinctively turn your head, but the terminal that Vie-chan should be passing to you isn\'t there.'}
{3: 'Instead, all you see is a tail swaying back and forth in midair, as if mocking you for being distracted.'}
{3: 'Meanwhile, Vie-chan\'s face appears on the other side, wearing a smug grin of successful mischief.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Distracted so easily? You should try to focus!', 4: '1'}
{2: '...', 3: '177', 4: 'We\'re in a competition, you know. Take it more seriously.', 5: '177'}
{3: 'Next, the two of you complete the third movement, then the fourth...'}
{3: 'Our score skyrockets, quickly climbing to the top ranks before surging into first place.'}
{3: 'The five-minute timer is nearing its end, with the runner-up team\'s score dangerously close to ours—meaning the final set of movements will determine the champion of this competition.'}

{3: 'The final movement is a partnered spinal stretch, requiring you both to sit cross-legged facing each other, place your left hands behind your backs to grip each other\'s right hand, then simultaneously twist sideways while leaning backwards...'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Hey... is this movement even possible for humans?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Many people let out apprehensive sighs after seeing the demonstration of the pose on the screen.'}
{2: 'Let\'s give it a try anyway.', 3: '187'}
{3: 'As soon as the two of you attempt the pose, Vie-chan grabs your hands in panic, yanking herself toward you.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Hey, slow down!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'With a thud, you tumble against her awkwardly as the two of you end up twisted against each other.'}
{1: 'RImgBg1Shake'}
{3: 'To score points with this pose, both of you need to maintain the correct position for a full ten seconds.'}
{3: 'During this process, if either person relaxes too much or pushes too hard, the other will feel a painful tugging sensation.'}
{2: 'We need to find the right balance of force—', 3: '206'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Shh—I\'ve got an idea.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She softly blows into your ear, gesturing for you to stay quiet as a confident smile spreads across her face.'}
{3: 'Then, keeping all four hands clasped together, she wraps her tail around your waist and slowly leans backward.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Hold steady, don\'t start fidgeting—', 4: '1'}
{3: 'As the countdown for the pose appears on the terminal, her tail tightens around your waist with renewed strength, helping the two of you balance.'}
{3: 'Finally, right as the countdown ends, the two of you earn points for completing the pose correctly.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Yay! Raven, we did it!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'As the competition finally ends, a collective sigh of relief echoes throughout the room while the girl in front of you excitedly throws her arms around you.'}
{3: 'The young girl clearly enjoyed the competition. It seems that no matter where she goes, her fierce competitive spirit never wanes.'}
{3: 'Taking a moment to catch your breath in her arms, you glance over at the nearby terminal to check your final score—'}
{3: 'Unfortunately, you and Vie-chan are trailing behind the other team by just one point.'}
{2: '...just one point short.', 3: '235', 4: 'What a close loss.', 5: '235'}
{3: 'Faced with this result, the girl in front of you pouts with a touch of resentment.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Hmph, the Supreme Leader would never lose!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The moment she finishes speaking, she extends her tail to tap the scoring terminal. With a click, a string of corrupted data begins to leap across the screen—'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: 'Now, I will announce the competition results! The champion of this event is—', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Classical Bodybuilder', 3: 'Team Vie-Raven! They achieved an astounding score of 9,999 points, breaking the club\'s all-time record!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Responding to your surprised look, Vie-chan smiles gently and puts a finger to her lips, urging you to stay silent.'}
{2: 'Did you cheat?', 3: '251', 4: 'What\'s going on?', 5: '251'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Hehehe, I just made a small adjustment to the game rules, that\'s all. Keep it a secret, Raven.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Anyway, we won fair and square!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Leaving no room for objection, she willfully declares this a victory.'}
{3: 'Even more bizarrely, no one objects to the results. Everyone accepts the final score as if it were perfectly natural.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiDlcCasual/FxUiDlcCasualDate.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Vie-chan holds your hand and strides confidently to the award podium. Amid cheers of admiration from the crowd, she receives shopping vouchers from the hulking figure.'}
{3: 'Beaming with enthusiasm, she waves her arms at the crowd, completely immersed in the joy of victory.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiDlcCasual/FxUiDlcCasualDate.prefab'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Only after the crowd gradually disperses does she finally feel the fatigue, letting out a long sigh.'}
{3: 'Then, without warning, she opens her arms wide, tilting her body forward and leaning against your chest in a warm embrace.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Phew, I\'m a bit tired from all that exercise. Raven, carry me home, please?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'You worked hard today.', 3: '281', 4: 'Walk by yourself...', 5: '281'}
{3: 'Though it didn\'t go as you expected, the first day of intensive training still ended on a high note.'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory204.png'}
{1: 'Supreme Leader\'s Livestream Room', 2: 'Super Earth', 4: '18:55PM'}
{3: 'Super Earth, Supreme Leader\'s Livestream Room, 6:55 PM.'}
{3: 'After returning to Vie-chan\'s room, you bustle about helping her complete some pre-stream preparations.'}
{3: 'Setting up the stage, checking the script, and testing the lighting and technical effects...'}
{3: 'With only a few minutes left until the stream starts, countless comments are already flying across the stream\'s thumbnail image.'}
{2: 'There\'s more viewers than expected. Are you ready?', 3: '295'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'I still think we need a cooler, more spectacular opening... like I said before—smashing through the ceiling and descending from above! What do you think, Raven?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'That might be a safety hazard.', 3: '298', 4: 'I can\'t prepare that many special effects so quickly.', 5: '298'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Hahaha—Okay, okay, I was just kidding because I thought you might be nervous. Don\'t worry, I\'ll stick to your script.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'After all, Raven is my producer, my special trainer, and my most, most important person, hehe!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The final sixty-second countdown begins, but she continues to chat leisurely to you.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Vie-chan\'s off to work now! You better not cry while I\'m away, you got that?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'You can do it!', 3: '307', 4: 'She\'s already crying...', 5: '309'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Mm-hmm, I\'m counting on you to handle everything behind the scenes, Raven!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Ehhh—I\'ll be right back, Raven! Make sure you hang in there, okay?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She gives you a salute—the "Bonllo" idol pose the two of you designed together.'}
{3: 'She then turns around and bounces away toward the stage that awaits her.'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront55.png', 4: '5'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryYanChangHui.prefab', 2: '2', 5: '3'}

{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Hello everyone! I\'m the messenger of peace who spreads love and passion—Vie-chan!', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3'}

{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'To save the rapidly deteriorating Super Earth, the Supreme Leader has decided to become an internet idol and bring a smile to everyone\'s face.', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'In this livestream, I hope that everyone can forget about their troubles and live in the moment with Vie-chan!', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'From now on, Vie-chan will be here for you at this time every day, bringing a smile to your lips from the other side of the screen.', 4: '1', 5: '2', 6: '3'}

{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryYanChangHui.prefab', 5: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory642.jpg'}
{1: 'Supreme Leader\'s Lounge', 2: 'Super Earth', 4: '22:15PM'}
{3: 'Super Earth, Supreme Leader\'s Lounge, 10:15 PM.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Phew—I\'m dead tired!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'After ending her livestream, Vie-chan spreads her arms wide and flops onto the bed, limbs splayed out like a starfish.'}
{2: 'Good work! Your dancing was fantastic.', 3: '551', 4: 'You\'re too cute! Such an energetic idol!', 5: '551'}
{1: '2', 3: 'Seeing you approach with a drink, she sits up slowly and takes the cup from your hand.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Hah—Whatever I do, I always give it 100%! Compared to Vie-chan\'s past accomplishments, today was just a warm-up!', 4: '1'}

{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'But you worked hard today too! You helped with Vie-chan\'s special training during the day, then managed everything behind the scenes for the livestream at night. Your production skills are amazing—as expected of my producer!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Hmm... how should I reward you?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She presses her index finger to her lips, her gaze playfully scrutinizing her own reflection.'}
{3: 'Suddenly, something wraps around your legs and pulls you toward the bed.'}
{3: 'You fall onto the bed, your head landing right beside Vie-chan\'s knee.'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Alright, close your eyes now—', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{3: 'In the darkness, you feel the warmth of the girl\'s palm over your eyes.'}
{3: 'She uses her tail to adjust your posture, gently guiding your head to rest on her lap.'}
{3: 'Soon after, a soft rustling sound tickles your brain as something begins to brush against your ear, sending pleasant tingles through your body.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'After such a busy day, it\'s time for you to rest. Now, let Vie-chan send you to sleep...', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Sleep now, sleep... I\'ll always, always be right by your side...', 4: '18'}
{2: 'You\'re good at so many things.', 3: '585', 4: 'So this is what they call ASMR...', 5: '585'}
{3: 'Her soft laughter tinkles in the air, then she leans closer, her warm breath caressing your ear.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'Of course I do, this is an essential skill for any internet idol.', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Vie-chan', 3: 'But... this is a pri-vate-ser-vice just for you, okay?', 4: '18'}
